publishedAbstract: - heketi-cli device add command failed.- Log of the pod `heketi-storage` in `glusterfs` project shows: ~~~ [kubeexec] ERROR heketi/pkg/remoteexec/kube/target.go:134:kube.TargetDaemonSet.GetTargetPod: Get https://9.255.0.1:443/api/v1/namespaces/glusterfs/pods?labelSelector=glusterfs-node: dial tcp:443: connect: network is unreachable [kubeexec] ERROR 2019/09/17 06:28:17 heketi/pkg/remoteexec/kube/target.go:135:kube.TargetDaemonSet.GetTargetPod: Failed to get list of pods ~~~
publishedTitle: heketi-cli fails with error "Failed to get list of pods"  in OCP 3
